probes.name: enrollment-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms athlete_enrollments table + partial unique indexes exist.

probes.name: enrollment-atomicity-invariant-clean
probes.description: Runs the ReconcileEnrollmentTeamMemberInvariantJob queries. Any active enrollment without a TeamMember OR any orphan TeamMember without an enrollment is a P1 finding.

probes.name: enrollment-activation-backlog
probes.description: Confirmed enrollments whose season has started but haven't been activated. Fires WARN when > 50. Indicates ActivateConfirmedEnrollmentsJob stalled.

probes.name: enrollment-waitlist-backlog
probes.description: Waitlisted enrollments on teams with open capacity. WARN when > 20 — PromoteWaitlistedEnrollmentsJob stalled or misconfigured.

probes.name: enrollment-atomicity-failure-rate
probes.description: Percentage of activation attempts firing EnrollmentAtomicityFailed. Any non-zero rate is a P1 signal.

probes.name: enrollment-slot-headroom
probes.description: Tenants within 10% of their athlete_enrollment_slot cap. Product signal for upgrade CTA.
